body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Daimon bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Neuropsychological dimensions related to alterations of verbal self-monitoring neural networks in schizophrenic language: systematic review.** — Frontiers in psychiatry (2024). PMID: 38501094. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyt.2024.1356726. Score: 39. Although schizophrenia has traditionally been interpreted as adisorder of thought, contemporary perspectives suggest that it may be more appropriate to conceptualize it as adisorder of language connectivity. The linguistic anomalies present in schizophrenia possess distinctive characteristics that, despite certain connections, are not comparable to aphasic disorders.
